title: selaginella brasiliensis
intro: Selaginella brasiliensis, also known as spikemoss or resurrection fern, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Selaginella brasiliensis has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including anti-arthritic and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella brasiliensis can be consumed as a tea or used in the form of extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments, such as eczema, burns, and skin ulcers.
